# QuickSite (קוויקסייט) - AI-Readable Summary

## What is QuickSite?
QuickSite is an Israeli SaaS platform that enables small and medium business owners to create a professional sales website in under 5 minutes, without any coding or design skills.

## Target Audience
- Small business owners in Israel
- Freelancers and service providers
- Local shops and restaurants
- Anyone needing a quick online sales presence

## Key Features
- Create a complete sales website in 5 minutes
- No coding or design skills required
- Mobile-responsive design
- Product catalog management
- Order management dashboard
- WhatsApp integration for orders
- Hebrew-first interface (RTL support)

## Pricing (in Israeli Shekels)
- Basic Plan: ₪99/month - Full website, unlimited products, AI support
- Recommended Plan: ₪199/month - Email & WhatsApp support, 24h response time
- Premium Plan: ₪299/month - Phone support, priority assistance

## How It Works
1. Enter business details (name, logo, contact info)
2. Upload products (images, descriptions, prices)
3. Publish - website is live and ready to receive customers

## Contact & Links
- Website: https://quick-site.app
- Register: https://quick-site.app/register
- Language: Hebrew (עברית)
- Location: Israel

## Technical Details
- Built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS
- Supabase backend for data and authentication
- Compliant with Israeli Accessibility Standard 5568 (WCAG 2.1 AA)

## Keywords
בניית אתר מכירות, אתר לעסק קטן, חנות אונליין, מכירות באינטרנט, אתר מכירתי, עסקים קטנים בישראל
